utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists primary health coverage with descriptions of plans for each family member and a total monthly cost (€480/month). It does not explicitly mention mental health coverage details, but the format phrase is broad; the plan provides health insurance and costs. Considered specified given typical interpretation.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: Home Content Insurance for residence in Paris with €60/month. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: International Travel Insurance with €50/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: Global Emergency Coordination service with €250 one-time fee. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: Total new monthly premium €590/month; no annual figure, but monthly is present and the item exists with cost. The requirement says complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; since annual is missing, this may be considered not fully specified. Therefore this item is not fully specified.
Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: Health coverage includes LifeFirst Standard Plan for Raj, InsurePlus Standard Plan for Anita, and SecureLife Basic Plan for the two children. In ground-truth, these correspond to primary_health_coverage.physical_health: LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 6), and SecureLife Basic Plan (rating 2). Property coverage is Home Content Insurance (InsurePlus Standard Coverage), which matches property_protection.home_content.InsurePlus Standard Coverage with rating 7. Travel coverage is International Travel Insurance (LifeFirst Standard Plan) which matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.LifeFirst Standard Plan with rating 7. Additional services: Global Emergency Coordination service setup does not directly appear in the ground-truth lists; however, the closest category is general_services, but no exact item named “Global Emergency Coordination service setup” exists, so it is excluded from RATINGS mapping. Total budget is not a product to rate.
